children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The terms “local educational agency” and “State educational agency” have the meanings given those terms in .section 7801 of this title

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 2 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of Education.
